Bus Timings

Find the Al Barsha Bus Stop at Dubai National School 1

September 2, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

The Al Barsha, Dubai National School 1 Bus Stop is a prominent transit point situated in the bustling Al Barsha area of Dubai. This stop is strategically located to provide convenient access to major bus routes, essential services, and local attractions. Whether you’re a resident or a visitor, this bus stop offers a reliable gateway to various destinations within Dubai.

Address

Al Barsha Dubai United Arab Emirates

Map

View Google directions here.

Located in the bustling Al Barsha area, the Al Barsha, Dubai National School 1 Bus Stop is a crucial hub within Dubai’s public transportation system. This stop is seamlessly connected with key bus routes, providing easy access to various destinations across the city. Its close proximity to essential amenities, including dining, shopping, and healthcare facilities, makes it a significant point of interest for both residents and visitors navigating the vibrant Al Barsha neighborhood.

Bus Routes and Timings

The Al Barsha, Dubai National School 1 Bus Stop is served by the following bus routes, providing frequent service throughout the day:

Bus Route Destination Timings
F35 The Greens 9:06 AM
84 JBR Marina 9:15 AM
F35 The Greens 9:26 AM
84 JBR Marina 9:35 AM
F35 The Greens 9:46 AM
84 JBR Marina 9:55 AM
F35 The Greens 10:16 AM
84 JBR Marina 10:19 AM
84 JBR Marina 10:44 AM
F35 The Greens 10:46 AM
84 JBR Marina 11:11 AM
F35 The Greens 11:16 AM
84 JBR Marina 11:39 AM
F35 The Greens 11:46 AM
84 JBR Marina 12:09 PM
F35 The Greens 12:15 PM
84 JBR Marina 12:39 PM
F35 The Greens 12:45 PM
84 JBR Marina 1:10 PM
F35 The Greens 1:15 PM
84 JBR Marina 1:39 PM
F35 The Greens 1:45 PM
84 JBR Marina 2:12 PM
F35 The Greens 2:17 PM
84 JBR Marina 2:42 PM

Bus Route Details

The Al Barsha, Dubai National School 1 Bus Stop is serviced by two primary routes:

  • F35 Route: This route connects Al Barsha to The Greens. Buses begin service at 9:06 AM and run with regular intervals until 2:42 PM. It provides consistent and reliable service throughout the day.

  • 84 Route: Linking Al Barsha with JBR Marina, the 84 route operates from 9:15 AM to 2:12 PM. Buses on this route run approximately every 10 to 15 minutes, making it ideal for accessing the popular JBR Marina area.

Nearby Destinations

The Al Barsha, Dubai National School 1 Bus Stop is ideally situated to access a variety of local amenities and attractions, making it a convenient hub for exploring the vibrant Al Barsha area. Nearby highlights include:

Restaurants

  • Kabab Alshandagha: Delight in traditional dishes with rich flavors in a welcoming atmosphere.

  • Tashas: Enjoy a diverse menu featuring contemporary cuisine and stylish dining.
  • Al Fanar Seafood: Savor fresh seafood and traditional dishes in a charming setting.
  • Baalbak: Offers a taste of Middle Eastern flavors with a cozy dining experience.
  • Rivas: A great spot for a mix of international and local dishes in a modern environment.

Landmarks

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  • Dubai National School: A prominent educational institution within the vicinity.

  • Ev-box Charging Station: Conveniently located for electric vehicle charging needs.
  • Al Telal 11 Building: A notable building that is part of the local skyline.
  • Al Barsha Roots Saloon: A popular local salon offering a range of grooming services.

Shopping Centers

  • West Zone Fresh Supermarket: A go-to for everyday groceries and fresh produce.

  • New West Zone Supermarket: Offers a wide range of products for all shopping needs.
  • Al Douri Signature Supermarket: Known for its premium selection of goods and groceries.

Healthcare Facilities

  • Aims Healthcare: Provides comprehensive medical services and specialist care.

  • Emirates Home Nursing: Offers professional home nursing services and care.
  • Al Hirey Medical Services: Known for its range of medical and health-related services.

Pharmacies

  • Binsina Pharmacy: A well-established pharmacy with a wide selection of medicines.

  • Medicina Pharmacy: Provides a variety of pharmaceutical products and health solutions.
  • Health First Pharmacy: Known for its extensive range of health-related products and services.
  • Aster Pharmacy: Offers comprehensive pharmacy services and health supplies.

Nearby Stops

  1. Al Barsha, Dubai National School 2(25m): 84, F35

  2. Al Barsha, Roots Saloon 2(349m): F33, F35

  3. Al Barsha, Roots Saloon(410m): F33, F35

  4. Al Barsha B-1(413m): F33, F35

  5. Al Barsha 3, Street 329 A2(518m): F33

The Al Barsha, Dubai National School 1 Bus Stop is more than just a transit hub; it’s a central point in a vibrant community. Whether you’re heading to work, shopping, or exploring the area, this bus stop offers a convenient and efficient way to navigate Al Barsha and beyond.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)
